title: FISH KISSER
description:
FISH KISSER is a funny rogue-like game where you catch fish... and maybe even kiss them too.

Catch Fish

Explore the ocean floor, progressing through rounds, catching groups of matching fish by circling them. If the schools of fish get too crowded, blast them apart with your trusty gun and set up even bigger catches. Be careful, some creatures will sabotage your run and tank your score.

Clownfish CardsMaximize your score with with Clownfish Cards. Multiply your score, manipulate spawn rates, create insane combo chains, and stack bizarre effects! Experiment with builds, and discover overpowered combinations.

Kiss Fish For ProfitEvery fish kissed earns you money.

Use your hard-earned fish dollars in the shop to buy upgrades, expand your build, and prepare for increasingly tough seabeds.

Features

Impress the residents of the island and become the ULTIMATE FISH KISSER.

• 40+ Clownfish Cards

• A shop to purchase Clownfish cards

• Roguelike progression

• Unlockable Cards and Challenges

• 5 Unique challenge modes

You sick freak...
description_short: FISH KISSER is a roguelike where you explore the bottom of the ocean, fulfilling your greatest fantasy: catching and kissing fish! Buy cards, earn points, and mildly disturb everyone on the island.
